name: SauceStack
pain: State-by-state cottage food confusion plus labeling and co-packer uncertainty
trigger: Moving from hobby batches to public selling
wedge: Compliance navigator plus label requirement checker
why_it_works: Clear buyer urgent trigger and obvious willingness to pay
distribution_path: Community plus search plus direct outreach

name: CraftLedger
pain: Underpricing labor weak quoting and poor materials tracking
trigger: Quoting custom work or realizing margins are fake
why_it_works: Small pricing improvements create immediate ROI

name: FlipTrack
pain: Inventory chaos tax panic and unclear profit by platform
distribution_path: Community plus search plus reseller creators

name: HiveStack
buyer: Sideline beekeepers and small commercial operators
pain: Colony loss treatment timing and weak profitability tracking
trigger: Seasonal planning or costly colony loss
wedge: Hive log plus treatment scheduler plus economics tracker
why_it_works: One avoided mistake can repay the product quickly

name: Building Permit Cross-Sell Intelligence
buyer: Roofers solar installers remodelers and home-service operators
pain: Poor visibility into new jobs at the right time
trigger: New permit filing by geography and trade
wedge: Permit-triggered lead alerts by trade and geography
why_it_works: Timing value is easy to explain and sell
distribution_path: Direct outreach plus local search plus trigger-based sales

name: Liquor License Opening Alerts
buyer: Restaurant vendors equipment suppliers POS sellers and insurers
pain: Missing the earliest buying window for new operators
why_it_works: Permits and approvals often precede heavy spending

name: Wage Theft Employer Database
buyer: Workers attorneys researchers and reputation-sensitive employers
pain: Labor violation data is hard to search and interpret
trigger: Job search litigation research or employer due diligence
wedge: Searchable employer violation database with alerts and summaries
why_it_works: Strong search intent and multiple monetization paths
distribution_path: Search plus legal and labor communities

name: CFPB Complaint Intelligence
buyer: Consumers analysts financial marketers and reputation operators
pain: Complaint data is difficult to interpret at decision level
wedge: Searchable complaint trends and reputation monitoring
why_it_works: Clear data source search behavior and downstream value

name: Federal Contracting Opportunity Engine
buyer: Government contractors consultants and capture teams
pain: Incumbent tools are expensive and government interfaces are painful
wedge: Better filtering search and alerting around solicitations
why_it_works: Clear spend ugly experience and high value per win
distribution_path: Search plus outbound plus gov communities

name: Restaurant Inspection Crisis Alerts
buyer: Restaurant operators consultants and reputation managers
pain: Inspection failures become public quickly and damage revenue
trigger: New failing grade or critical violation
why_it_works: Clear trigger urgency and downstream spend

name: Contractor License Violation Monitor
buyer: Contractors insurers sureties and compliance service providers
pain: Disciplinary actions and licensing lapses are hard to track
wedge: Monitoring plus alerting plus referral hooks
why_it_works: Timing matters and delay is expensive

name: Small-Batch Production Tracker
pain: Spreadsheet-heavy batch logs poor traceability and weak costing discipline
trigger: Scaling production beyond memory and notebooks
wedge: Batch management for one production type first
why_it_works: Operational consistency is painful enough to monetize
distribution_path: Community plus niche creators plus search

name: Artisan Supplier Intelligence Directory
pain: Supplier quality lead time price and trust are fragmented and anecdotal
trigger: Sourcing a new supplier or preparing to scale
wedge: Searchable vetted supplier database by niche
why_it_works: Repeat use community trust and adjacent monetization

name: UCC Filing Lead Intelligence
buyer: Insurers lenders equipment vendors and service providers
pain: Poor visibility into businesses that just financed assets
why_it_works: Financing events create intent-rich lead windows

name: Compliance Launch Planner
buyer: Niche operators moving from hobby to business in regulated categories
pain: No structured path across entity setup compliance pricing and first sales
trigger: Decision to go legit or sell publicly
wedge: Vertical-specific launch planner with templates and state guidance
why_it_works: The buyer trigger is obvious and emotionally charged
distribution_path: Community plus search plus direct outreach
